title: Mashup Workout Buns
description: A delicious and savory twist on traditional Japanese buns, perfect for post-workout snacking. Crunchy texture and umami flavors come together in this tasty treat.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick pan or griddle over medium heat.
In a large bowl, mix together rice flour, mashed sweet potato, soy sauce, peanut butter, and honey.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until it comes together and is slightly sticky.
Divide the dough into 4-6 equal pieces, depending on desired bun size.
Roll each piece into a ball and flatten slightly into a disk shape.
Cook the buns in the preheated pan for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown and crispy.
